pp-operation-curl.curl-json: [{"label":"Production · No Auth","serverUrl":"https://skingenius-sigma.vercel.app","serverDescription":"Production","securityLabel":"No Auth","command":"curl -X POST \\\n  'https://skingenius-sigma.vercel.app/api/v1/recommendations' \\\n  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \\\n  -H 'Accept: application/json' \\\n  -d '{\"conditions\":[{\"condition_id\":\"fzS\",\"confidence\":0,\"features\":[\"Rez\"],\"name\":\"Post-Inflammatory Hyperpigmentation (PIH)\",\"severity\":\"severe\",\"zone\":\"cheek-left\"}],\"fitzpatrick_type\":4,\"price_tier\":\"$$$\",\"skin_type\":\"oily\"}'"}]

pp-operation-raw.raw-json:
{"description":"Returns personalized product recommendations based on detected conditions,
skin type, Fitzpatrick type, and user preferences.
Uses Fit Score algorithm with evidence-weighted matching.
","operationId":"getRecommendations","requestBody":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"$ref":"#/components/schemas/RecommendationRequest"}}},"required":true},"responses":{"200":{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"$ref":"#/components/schemas/RecommendationResponse"}}},"description":"Recommendations returned"}},"summary":"Get product recommendations"}
pp-operation-raw.raw-yaml:
operationId: getRecommendations
summary: Get product recommendations
description: |
    Returns personalized product recommendations based on detected conditions,
    skin type, Fitzpatrick type, and user preferences.
    Uses Fit Score algorithm with evidence-weighted matching.
requestBody:
    required: true
    content:
        application/json:
            schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/RecommendationRequest'
responses:
    '200':
        description: Recommendations returned
        content:
            application/json:
                schema:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/RecommendationResponse'
